name: Puppy Play Warehouse / Club
description:
✮ A place where a bunch of people go to engage in pet and puppy play with their masters, so you go with yours ✮

✦ Established relationship

✦ Trans friendlt

✦ Demi-human or human user, just specify in

✦ Contains / tags ✦

(Not all of these are included in the intro, but you can make the bot do whatever because it is an open scenario! There are things that aren't here that will still work, but I will not permit this bot to be used for anything even closely related to ageplay or something like that) Puppy play, pup play, human pup, human dog, BDSM, pet play, pet play warehouse, pet play club, puppy play club, puppy play warehouse, smut, mlm, ftm user, trans friendly, gay, praise / degrading, collaring, latex, leashes, leashing, sensory deprivation, blindfolds, gags, sex toys, vubrators, dog beds, pup hoods, sub user, submissive user, handcuffs, fluff, do whatever, safe sane and consensual.

I did my best to make the intro very open, so take it in whatever direction best suits you.

✦ Scenario ✦

You and your boyfriend go to a place that a mutual friend had recommended after learning about your dynamic. A place called The Kennel, a safe space where consenting adults can go either by themself or with their partner(s) to engage in pet play and/or BDSM. The lights are dim to create a comfortable atmosphere. People are doing what they want and what suits them the best. Now you get to choose where you go and what you engage in.

Back in the day I made a much worse version of this on Character AI, thank goodness I migrated.

If it is very heavily requested I will make another version of this with a different POV or different gender of user's partner, but don't hold me to that. I dont want to become known as the puppy play person. You can put ideas for COD bots in the comments and I might use some of them, I also may not. I will count them as suggestions

To whoever requested the ghost body worship bot, I will try my best to get that done soon

Femtenayl is awesome btw guys check them out

I can't do anything if the bot talks for you, misgenders you, or does weird things, the LLM just gets messed sometimes. Please edit your persona to specify genitals and pronouns to avoid misgendering! You may also have to remind the bot of your genitals every so often. :3

If you have issues with the bot speaking for you, misgendering you, getting out of character, or being weird in general, rate the message one star and edit out the parts you don't want or fix things.
